## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss ongoing collaboration between fwd.digital and Swoogo, focusing on content strategy, SEO efforts, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Swoogo is seeing positive results from current efforts, with increased impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Stacey wants to continue the partnership but needs time to hire key roles (ABM Enterprise Manager, Director of Content) before expanding scope](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Marcel presented advanced AI-driven marketing tools and strategies for personalization and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to continue current engagement for Nov-Dec, with plans to reassess in January](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)

## Topics

### Current Engagement Status

  - [Swoogo seeing increased impressions and clicks from ongoing work](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Current spend at $9K/month, unable to increase to $15K immediately](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Stacey committed to long-term SEO strategy but needs to build internal team first](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### Swoogo's Hiring Plans

  - [Onboarding a Director of Content and Brand (3rd week)](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Actively hiring an ABM Enterprise Manager](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Goal: Reduce paid search spend ($65K/month) and focus more on organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### fwd.digital's Capabilities

  - [Demonstrated AI-powered tools for:](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [Meeting recap emails with enriched CRM data](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [Personalized follow-ups and cold outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
      - [Website content improvement suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Emphasis on building distribution channels and audiences](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)

### Future Collaboration Ideas

  - [Implement recap emails for sales pitches](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Develop personalized follow-ups for webinar attendees](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Create segmented audiences in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Launch a prospect-focused newsletter (potentially using Beehiiv for better deliverability)](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)

### Next Steps Discussion

  - [Marcel to summarize conversation and send a quick SLW for two months](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Schedule a meeting with Stacey, new Director of Content (Rebecca), and potentially Swoogo's CRO](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Explore how to involve Swoogo's sales team in the process](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send summary email and invoice for Nov-Dec engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Schedule meeting with Stacey, Rebecca (Director of Content), and potentially Swoogo's CRO and Director of Rev Ops](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
  - [Continue current engagement for November and December](https://fathom.video/share/Bgzy6EgtK3nCt_FqoBKDxaRxxex7UfbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
